title: Bug Report — Dashboard Export Broken
description: Detailed bug report with reproduction steps. Tests Bug Report category, Product Team routing, Medium priority.
subject: Bug: Dashboard CSV export produces empty file when filtering by date range
body:
Hi team,

I'd like to report a bug in the web dashboard (Team Plan).

Steps to reproduce:
1. Go to Reports > Sales
2. Apply a custom date filter (e.g. last 30 days)
3. Click 'Export CSV'
4. The downloaded file is 0 bytes and contains no data

Expected: CSV file with the filtered rows.
Actual: Empty file.

This happens consistently in Chrome 126 and Firefox 127. Export works fine when no date filter is applied, so the issue seems specific to filtered exports.

Browser: Chrome 126.0.6478.126
OS: macOS 14.5
User: priya.patel@brightlabs.io
Account: Bright Labs (Team Plan)

Happy to provide a screen recording if helpful.

Thanks,
Priya
